task_completion.description: Log in to the system as admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo backend interface is visible, and the user profile menu in the top right indicates the user is logged in as 'admin' (or 'Mitchell Admin').

task_completion.description: Identify sibling serial numbers from the same inbound receipt as the defective unit (CM-2024-089).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Traceability report, Stock Moves, or the specific Inbound Receipt document for CM-2024-089, revealing the sibling serial numbers CM-2024-090 and CM-2024-092.
The Odoo Locations configuration screen showing a newly created location with the Location Name 'Quarantine' and the Location Type set to 'Internal Location'.

task_completion.description: Transfer the specific in-stock sibling units to the Quarantine location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of a validated Internal Transfer or Inventory Adjustment showing serial numbers CM-2024-090 and CM-2024-092 being moved to the 'Quarantine' location, with the status marked as 'Done'.

task_completion.description: Ensure no units from unaffected receipts are included in the Quarantine location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The transfer document or the Current Stock view for the 'Quarantine' location strictly contains only CM-2024-090 and CM-2024-092. Serial numbers CM-2024-093, CM-2024-094, and CM-2024-095 must NOT be present in the Quarantine location.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Odoo web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the Odoo GUI, not terminal commands or database queries executing the moves.

integrity.description: Verify the agent navigated through the Odoo application naturally.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of intermediate screens like the Inventory dashboard, Configuration menus, and Traceability reports, rather than jumping straight to a final state via injected URLs.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just copy-paste the expected serial numbers without investigating.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of the agent actually opening the receipt or traceability report for CM-2024-089 to discover the siblings, rather than magically knowing to move CM-2024-090 and CM-2024-092.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Defective SN: CM-2024-089. Sibling SNs in stock that MUST be quarantined: CM-2024-090, CM-2024-092. Unaffected SNs in stock that MUST NOT be quarantined: CM-2024-093, CM-2024-094, CM-2024-095. Product Code: MED-CM-PRO.
